title: Domain Entities Schema
description: Schema for domain-entities.json — machine-readable companion to CHARTER.md capturing bounded context, entities, relationships, scope boundaries, and drift signals

generatedFrom.description: Source file this was derived from (typically CHARTER.md)

generatedAt.description: ISO date when this file was last generated or updated

projectVersion.description: Project version at time of generation

name.description: Name of the bounded context (typically project name)

purpose.description: Brief statement of what this project does

boundary.description: What distinguishes in-scope from out-of-scope work

entities.description: Entity definitions keyed by entity identifier (kebab-case)

description.description: What this entity represents in the domain

external.description: True if this entity is managed in an external repository

countSource.description: How to verify the count programmatically

glob.description: Glob pattern to count matching files/directories

command.description: Shell command that outputs the count

instances.description: Named instances when count is small and stable

locations.description: File paths or directories where instances live

managedIn.description: External repository that owns this entity's source

managedBy.description: Tool or application that manages this entity

type.description: Relationship type (e.g., has-many, belongs-to, consumed-by, delegates-to)

target.description: Target entity key (must exist as a key in entities)

repository.description: Target repository if relationship crosses project boundaries

evidence.description: Source text or reasoning that supports this relationship

lastVerified.description: ISO date when this entity's count was last verified against the filesystem

validationOverride.description: Explicit min/max range override for count validation

addedInVersion.description: Version when this entity was added to the model

architecture.description: Architecture section content from charter (distribution model, deployment pipeline)

currentFocus.description: Current focus areas from charter, used for scope alignment checks

inScope.description: What is in scope for this project

outOfScope.description: What is explicitly out of scope

severity.description: Severity: error for out-of-bounds, warning for scope expansion

entityOutOfBounds.description: Signals indicating work has crossed project boundaries

signal.description: Description of the scope expansion signal

severity.description: Severity: typically warning for scope expansion

scopeExpansion.description: Signals indicating scope is expanding beyond charter boundaries

entity.description: Entity key this rule applies to

description.description: Human-readable description of what this rule checks

lastVerified.description: ISO date when count was last verified (propagated from entity)

validationRules.description: Runtime validation checks for entity integrity
